body_excerpt: {"credits": [{"type": "analyst", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/54543298?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/DEVSOG12/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/DEVSOG12/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/DEVSOG12/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/DEVSOG12/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/DEVSOG12", "id": 54543298, "login": "DEVSOG12", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjU0NTQzMjk4", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/DEVSOG12/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/DEVSOG12/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/DEVSOG12/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/DEVSOG12/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/DEVSOG12/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/DEVSOG12", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": null, "cvss": {"score": 5.5, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:L/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:N/A:H"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 5.5, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:L/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:N/A:H"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 6.8, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:L/AC:L/AT:N/PR:L/UI:N/VC:N/VI:N/VA:H/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-126", "name": "Buffer Over-read"}], "description": "The `heap-buffer-overflow` is triggered in the `strlen()` function when handling the `c_chars_to_str` function in the dbn crate. This vulnerability occurs because the `CStr::from_ptr()` function in Rust assumes that the provided C string is null-terminated. However, there is no guarantee that the input chars array passed to the c_chars_to_str function is properly null-terminated.\n\nIf the chars array does not contain a null byte (\\0), strlen() will continue to read beyond the bounds of the buffer in search of a null terminator. This results in an out-of-bounds memory read and can lead to a heap-buffer-overflow, potentially causing memory corruption or exposing sensitive information.", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-pfr9-2p92-qrhq", "github_reviewed_at": "2024-10-09T14:34:24Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-pfr9-2p92-qrhq", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-pfr9-2p92-qrhq"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2024-10-09T14:34:24Z", "references": ["https://github.com/databento/dbn/issues/67", "https://github.com/databento/dbn/commit/339efb90fdb980920a5e8829008abc1114f4bfdd", "https://rustsec.org/advisories/RUSTSEC-2024-0377.html", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-pfr9-2p92-qrhq"], "repository_advisory_url": null, "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/databento/dbn", "summary": "Databento Binary Encoding (DBN) has a heap buffer overflow using c_chars_to_str function", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-20T00:56:58Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-pfr9-2p92-qrhq", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "0.22.1", "package": {"ecosystem": "rust", "name": "dbn"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 0.22.0"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Databento Binary Encoding (DBN) has a heap buffer overflow using c_chars_to_str function
